query: SELECT p.id, p.numeroCnj, p.tipoAcao, p.faseAtual, p.statusProcesso, p.valorCausa, p.poloAtivo, p.poloPassivo, p.vara, p.comarca, p.tribunal, p.juiz, p.textoExtraido IS NOT NULL as temTexto, LENGTH(p.textoExtraido) as tamanhoTexto, c.id as clienteId, c.nomeCompleto as clienteNome, c.cpfCnpj FROM processos p LEFT JOIN clientes c ON p.clienteId = c.id ORDER BY p.id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT p.id, p.numeroCnj, p.tipoAcao, p.faseAtual, p.statusProcesso, p.valorCausa, p.poloAtivo, p.poloPassivo, p.vara, p.comarca, p.tribunal, p.juiz, p.textoExtraido IS NOT NULL as temTexto, LENGTH(p.textoExtraido) as tamanhoTexto, c.id as clienteId, c.nomeCompleto as clienteNome, c.cpfCnpj FROM processos p LEFT JOIN clientes c ON p.clienteId = c.id ORDER BY p.id
